claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Consumer-selected div, section, ul, or ol
semantics.rolePolicy: CSS grid never implies ARIA grid; native document or list semantics remain authoritative.

layout.intrinsic: Auto mode uses auto-fit and a minmax bound that cannot exceed the available inline size.
layout.fixedColumns: Explicit column counts use minmax(0, 1fr) and do not create a horizontal minimum.
layout.overflow: Direct items have zero minimum inline size and anywhere wrapping; content is not clipped.

consumerResponsibilities: Do not add role=grid unless implementing the complete interactive grid keyboard and focus contract.
Render li children for ul and ol roots and keep visual order aligned with DOM order.
Give intrinsically unbreakable embedded content an accessible local overflow strategy.
